title: Broken Bicycle 自行车坏了
scene: Jack骑自行车时轮胎瘪了，不知道怎么办。

lines.en: Dad, something is wrong with my bike!
lines.zh: 爸爸，我的自行车有问题！

lines.en: What happened? Pull over to the side.
The tire is flat. I think it hit a nail.
lines.zh: 轮胎瘪了。好像扎到钉子了。

lines.en: Let me take a look. Yes, there is a hole in the tire.
lines.zh: 让我看看。是的，轮胎上有个洞。

lines.en: We need a patch kit. I have one in the car.
lines.zh: 我们需要补胎工具。我车里有一个。

lines.en: How long will it take to fix?
About ten minutes. Help me take the wheel off.
lines.zh: 大约十分钟。帮我拆下轮子。

lines.en: OK, here you go. Can I learn how to fix it?
lines.zh: 好的，给你。我能学怎么修吗？

lines.en: Of course. Next time you can do it yourself.
lines.zh: 当然。下次你就能自己修了。
